title: AMD Instinct MI300 CDNA3 Instruction Set Architecture
preview: Official AMD ISA reference for the MI300 series (CDNA3), documenting Matrix Core instructions, memory model, and vector compute operations.
summary: Complete instruction set reference for AMD CDNA3 architecture including MFMA (Matrix Fused Multiply-Add) instructions at all supported precisions, scalar/vector/memory instruction encodings, LDS operations, and the unified CPU+GPU memory model unique to MI300A. Essential for low-level kernel development and compiler backend work.
datacenter: Core reference for AI software teams targeting MI300 clusters. Understanding the ISA is prerequisite for writing and validating high-performance ROCm kernels, validating compiler output, and diagnosing hardware-level performance issues in production training and inference workloads.
metrics: Key result signal: reference specification enabling cycle-accurate understanding of MFMA throughput and latency across precisions.
